current.summary: Conflict detection fully implemented (steps 1-4 + e2e tests): OpenCode bug fixed, GlobalSharedReadPaths added, DetectConflicts + ApplyConflictResolution implemented, CLI prompt wired into --to-all with --no-input fallback. 28 tests. Committed and pushed.

activeWork.description: Implement TUI modal for install-path conflict resolution in the install wizard flow.
activeWork.progress: Steps 1-4 complete and pushed (commit b29cecd). Step 5 (CLI prompt) is done. Step 6 (TUI modal) is next. Step 7 (test roundup) follows. The conflict detection logic is in cli/internal/installer/conflict.go. The CLI integration is in cli/cmd/syllago/install_cmd.go (runInstallToAll). The injectable resolveConflict var makes TUI integration straightforward.

git.lastCommit: b29cecd fix: remove unused skillsIn helper from conflict test

completedThisSession.step1_opencode_bug: Added .agents/skills/ to OpenCode DiscoveryPaths. Regression test added.
completedThisSession.step2_global_shared_read_paths: New GlobalSharedReadPaths field on Provider struct. Populated for Gemini CLI, Windsurf, Roo Code, OpenCode. 12 tests.
completedThisSession.step3_conflict_detection: DetectConflicts() + Conflict struct + ConflictResolution type + ApplyConflictResolution() in cli/internal/installer/conflict.go. 10 tests.
completedThisSession.step4_cli_prompt: var resolveConflict injectable + resolveConflictInteractively (stdin, 3 options). Wired into runInstallToAll. --no-input prints warning and proceeds with ResolutionAll. 6 RunE tests + 4 subprocess e2e tests (SYLLAGO_TEST_E2E=1).

recentDecisions: TDD Red/Green throughout: write failing tests first, implement to pass
var resolveConflict injectable (same pattern as findProjectRoot) — allows RunE tests to stub stdin without infrastructure changes
Subprocess e2e tests gated behind SYLLAGO_TEST_E2E=1 env var (matches SYLLAGO_TEST_NETWORK pattern)
t.TempDir() used for all e2e test isolation — no stray files in real home; Cleanup_Proof test verifies this
NoConflict test must replace AllProviders entirely (not just append) to avoid real conflicting providers on the system being detected
--no-input uses ResolutionAll (current behavior, no change) as safe default for non-interactive mode
nextSteps: Step 6: Add TUI modal for conflict resolution in install wizard (cli/internal/tui/). When install wizard reaches the multi-provider path, call installer.DetectConflicts and show a modal with 3 options if conflicts found. Use the tui-builder skill for TUI patterns.
Step 7: Test roundup — ensure TUI modal has golden file tests and wizard invariant tests per tui-wizard-patterns.md and wizard_invariant_test.go patterns.
Step 8: Commit TUI modal + tests, push, write final handoff.

context.notes: The install wizard TUI is in cli/internal/tui/install.go (installWizardModel). The multi-provider flow through runInstallToAll is the CLI path; the TUI equivalent needs to mirror the same conflict detection before it starts installing. The resolveConflict injectable is CLI-only — the TUI modal is a separate flow that calls installer.DetectConflicts directly and handles resolution via a BubbleTea modal step. See tui-builder skill for TUI golden rules. See wizard_invariant_test.go for the test pattern.
